title: SDDMASC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 03 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Shri Dada Dev Matri Avum Shishu Chikitsalaya, Dabri (SDDMASC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, DNB, PGDM, and Post-graduation can apply for the SDDMASC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
